args: $path = 'C:\Users\user\Documents\trash\Program\2026-05'; if (Test-Path $path) { $size = (Get-ChildItem -Path $path -Recurse -File | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{ Path=$path; Bytes=$size; MB=[Math]::Round($size/1MB,2); GB=[Math]::Round($size/1GB,3) } } else { Write-Error 'Path not found' }
